Bouncy Castle Rentals in O'Leary PEI

O'Leary is a small western PEI community at the heart of Prince County's potato-growing region, home to the Canadian Potato Museum. Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater, Nova Scotia. O'Leary PEI is the heart of PEI's potato country in Prince County, home to the Canadian Potato Museum, approximately 390 km from our base. PEI bookings are handled on a selected larger-event basis by quote only. If you are planning a school carnival, community festival, or large outdoor event on the Island, reach out and we will assess feasibility.

O'Leary PEI is approximately 390 km from Bridgewater. PEI bookings are for selected larger events by quote only. Travel, ferry logistics, accommodation, and all setup requirements are reviewed and confirmed before any booking is accepted.

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you deliver inflatable rentals to O'Leary PEI?
O'Leary PEI is approximately 390 km from Bridgewater. PEI bookings are for selected larger events by quote only. Contact us to discuss your event.
How do I confirm my booking?
Submitting a request does not confirm your booking. We review availability, travel cost, setup suitability, and deposit requirements, then send you confirmation details. Your booking is only confirmed once a deposit is received.
What is the wind limit for inflatables?
Our rental agreement requires inflatables to be taken down or not set up if sustained winds reach 38 km/h or higher. Safety is the priority and we monitor conditions on your event day.
What deposit is required?
A deposit is required to hold your date. The deposit amount and payment method (e-Transfer is preferred) are confirmed when we send your booking details.
What events are popular for inflatable rentals in O'Leary PEI?
In O'Leary PEI we most commonly supply inflatables and party packages for backyard birthday parties, school fun days, community festivals, and summer outdoor events. Tell us your event type and we'll recommend the right setup.
